name: The Animus Bond
description: Master the connection with your external soul, perceive Aether Motes, and perhaps learn the witch's secret of separation.
lore:
Your animus is your soul made visible - an animal companion that is truly
a part of you. In childhood, your animus shifts form constantly; in adulthood,
they settle into one form that reflects your true nature. The bond between
human and animus is unbreakable... or so most believe.

Aether Motes - the golden particles of consciousness - settles on those with settled
animuses. Learn to perceive it, and you may glimpse truths hidden from others.

And for those with witch blood, there is another path: the terrible ordeal
of separation, which allows you to travel apart from your animus. But the
price is paid in pain.

nodes.name: Animus Bond
nodes.description: The fundamental connection between you and your animus

effects.description: Connected to your external soul

nodes.lore:
Your animus is your soul made visible - an animal companion that is
truly a part of you. The bond between human and animus is sacred and unbreakable.
To be separated from your animus causes physical pain; to have it touched by
another is the deepest violation.

nodes.name: Emotional Synchronization
nodes.description: Deepen the emotional connection with your animus

effects.description: +X% emotional attunement with animus

nodes.lore: When you feel, your animus feels. Learning to synchronize your emotions allows for clearer communication and mutual support.

nodes.name: Silent Speech
nodes.description: Learn to communicate with your animus through thought alone

effects.description: Communicate with animus without speaking

nodes.name: Sacred Boundary
nodes.description: Your awareness of the sacred boundary around your animus

effects.description: Sense when someone intends to touch your animus
Others sense the taboo instinctively

nodes.lore: The touch of another human on your animus is the deepest violation possible. Even enemies hesitate at this taboo.

nodes.name: Form Awareness
nodes.description: Learn to read the meaning in animus forms

effects.description: Understand what animus forms mean about personality

nodes.lore:
A person's animus reveals their true nature. A servant with a dog animus
has a loyal soul. A person with a snake animus... well, you know to be wary.

nodes.name: Form Flexibility
nodes.description: In childhood, animuses can take any form

effects.description: Animus can change forms freely (pre-settling only)

nodes.lore: Children's animuses shift constantly - now a moth, now a wildcat, now a bird. This flexibility is the mark of an unsettled soul, full of possibility.

nodes.name: The Settling
nodes.description: Your animus has settled into its final form

effects.description: Animus has taken its permanent form
Aether Motes are now attracted to you and your animus

nodes.lore:
The settling comes to all who grow up. One day your animus shifts for
the last time, and you know - this is who you are. This is who you've always been.
Some welcome it with joy; others mourn the loss of possibility.

nodes.name: Form Affinity
nodes.description: Embrace the strengths of your animus's form

effects.description: Gain abilities based on animus's settled form

nodes.lore: A person with a hawk animus sees further. A person with a wolf animus has keener instincts for danger. Your form is your destiny.

nodes.name: Form Mastery
nodes.description: Master the unique abilities of your animus's form

effects.description: +X% effectiveness of form abilities

nodes.name: Aether Mote Sense
nodes.description: Learn to perceive the conscious particles called Aether Motes

effects.description: Can perceive Aether Motes particles

nodes.lore:
Aether Motes are consciousness made manifest - golden particles that settle on
those who think and feel. Children cannot see it, for Aether Motes are drawn only
to settled animuses and mature minds.

nodes.name: Aether Mote Vision
nodes.description: See the golden streams of Aether Motes flowing through the world

effects.description: See Aether Mote currents and concentrations

nodes.name: Aether Mote Attraction
nodes.description: Learn to draw Aether Motes toward you through focused consciousness

effects.description: Attract more Aether Motes to yourself

nodes.lore: Those who think deeply, who question, who love and hate with passion - they draw Aether Motes like lodestone draws iron.

nodes.name: Veridex Reading
nodes.description: Learn to read the Veridex - the symbolic truth-reading instrument

effects.description: Can read the Veridex

unlockConditions.description: Must find a teacher of veridex reading
Must have access to an veridex

nodes.lore:
The veridex speaks through Aether Motes. Thirty-six symbols, infinite
meanings, and truth for those patient enough to learn. Most scholars take
decades to master even a portion of its language.

nodes.name: Intuitive Reading
nodes.description: Read the veridex through pure instinct

effects.description: Read the veridex by instinct

unlockConditions.description: Must possess the rare gift of intuitive reading

nodes.lore:
Some rare individuals - almost always children - can read the veridex
without training. They slip into a trance-like state and the answers come.
But this gift fades with settling, with knowledge, with growing up.

nodes.name: Aether Mote Navigation
nodes.description: Learn to sense the currents of Aether Motes that flow between worlds

effects.description: Sense and navigate Aether Mote currents between worlds

nodes.lore: Aether Motes flow between worlds through windows and cracks in reality. Those sensitive enough can feel these currents and follow them.

nodes.name: Aether Mote Communion
nodes.description: Achieve direct communion with Aether Motes consciousness

effects.description: Enter deep communion with Aether Motes
Wisdom gained from Aether Mote consciousness

unlockConditions.description: Must have strong Aether Mote affinity

nodes.lore: Aether Motes are not merely particles - it is consciousness itself, the accumulated wisdom of countless beings. To commune with Aether Motes is to touch something vast and ancient.

nodes.name: Witch Blood
nodes.description: The blood of witches runs in your veins

effects.description: Potential for animus separation
Extended lifespan potential

nodes.lore:
Witches are not human - not quite. They live for centuries, fly through
the northern skies, and bear a terrible secret: they can separate from
their animuses. This power comes at a price paid in pain.

nodes.name: The Ordeal
nodes.description: Undergo the terrible ordeal of separation

effects.description: Can begin separation from animus

unlockConditions.description: Must endure the pain of stretching the bond

nodes.lore:
Every witch must face the ordeal - walking away from their animus until
the bond stretches to the breaking point. The pain is indescribable. Many
do not survive. Those who do are forever changed.

nodes.name: Initial Separation
nodes.description: Maintain separation at short distances

effects.description: Can separate up to 50 meters from animus

nodes.name: Extended Separation
nodes.description: Extend the distance you can travel from your animus

effects.description: +X meters separation distance

nodes.name: Unlimited Separation
nodes.description: Travel any distance from your animus

effects.description: Can separate any distance from animus

nodes.lore: The greatest witches can send their animuses to the far side of the world while they remain at home. The bond stretches but never breaks.

nodes.name: Cloud-Pine Flight
nodes.description: Master the art of flying on cloud-pine

effects.description: Can fly on cloud-pine branch

unlockConditions.description: Must bond with a cloud-pine branch

nodes.lore: Witches fly on branches of cloud-pine, racing through the northern skies faster than any bird. This is their birthright.

nodes.name: Animus Scout
nodes.description: Send your animus ahead to scout while you remain behind

effects.description: Send animus ahead as a scout
See through animus's eyes while separated

nodes.name: Severance Awareness
nodes.description: Recognize the horror of severance

effects.description: Recognize severed individuals

nodes.lore:
Severance - the cutting of the bond between human and animus.
Those who have been severed are empty, dead-eyed, barely human.
The Orthodoxy calls it "performing the separation." We call it murder of the soul.

nodes.name: Bond Fortification
nodes.description: Strengthen your bond against those who would sever it

effects.description: Resistance to forced separation attempts

nodes.name: Deep Bond
nodes.description: Achieve a profound unity with your animus

effects.description: Animus is a true extension of yourself
Share sensory input with animus

nodes.name: Animus Combat
nodes.description: Learn to fight in perfect coordination with your animus

effects.description: Fight in coordination with animus
Bonus when animus assists in combat

unlockConditions.description: Animus must have a combat-capable form

nodes.lore: Your animus can bite, claw, distract - but more importantly, they can warn you of danger and watch your back. Fighting as one is fighting as two.

xpSources.description: Resist a threat to your animus bond
Your animus settles or reveals a truth about form

progressLossConditions.description: Severance permanently destroys all animus abilities
